_README: ⚠️ YEH FILE PLACEHOLDER HAI — REAL FILE NEECHE LIKHE STEPS SE BANAO
_INSTRUCTIONS: STEP 3: Project Settings (gear icon) → General tab
STEP 4: 'Your apps' section mein 'Add app' → Android icon click karo
STEP 5: Android package name daalo: com.nexearnpro.app
STEP 6: App nickname: Nex Earn Pro
STEP 7: SHA-1 key (optional for now, required for Google Sign-In)
STEP 10: Yeh placeholder file delete karo
STEP 11: Downloaded google-services.json ko android/app/ folder mein rakho
⚠️ IMPORTANT: android/app/google-services.json hona chahiye, NOT project root mein
- Firebase Console → Authentication → Sign-in method → Google enable karo
- SHA-1 fingerprint add karna zaroori hai
- Release build ke liye release keystore ka SHA-1 bhi add karo
